## Type of contribution

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Update to an existing skill
- [ ] Curated external skill link
- [ ] Documentation or meta change

## Checklist

- [ ] No client names, API keys, or personal paths remain in the files.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter has `name`, `description`, `license`.
- [ ] `README.md` answers: what, when, how to install, example.
- [ ] I have actually used this skill in my own work recently.
- [ ] External references are credited with author and source URL.
